creator: eric@krausser-edv.de
text:
jakarta-commons-httpclient fails to build because of non-UTF8 symbol,
see PR ports/165774


error message:
compile:
    [javac] /usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/build.xml:184: warning: 'includeantruntime' was not set, defaulting to build.sysclasspath=last; set to false for repeatable builds
    [javac] Compiling 139 source files to /usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/target/classes
    [javac] /usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/src/java/org/apache/commons/httpclient/HttpContentTooLargeException.java:6: error: unmappable character for encoding ASCII
    [javac]  * @author Ortwin Gl?ck
    [javac]                     ^
    [javac] /usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/src/java/org/apache/commons/httpclient/WireLogInputStream.java:40: error: unmappable character for encoding ASCII

    [javac]  * @author Ortwin Gl???ck
    [javac]                     ^
    [javac] /usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/src/java/org/apache/commons/httpclient/auth/HttpAuthenticator.java:65: error: unmappable character for encoding ASCII
    [javac]  * @author Ortwin Gl???ck

BUILD FAILED
/usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/build.xml:184: Compile failed; see the compiler error output for details.

Fix: please apply the attached patch, it does reverse the change from revision 312555 to 312556

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: try to build the port in a clean jail
